name: lame-cylinder
citation: Lamé (1852), thick-walled cylinder under internal pressure, plane strain. Parameters: a = 0.05 m (inner radius), b = 0.10 m (outer), p = 10 MPa internal, E = 200 GPa, nu = 0.3. With A = p a^2/(b^2-a^2) and B = A b^2: sigma_r = A - B/r^2, sigma_theta = A + B/r^2, u_r = (1+nu)/E * (A(1-2nu) r + B/r). At r = a: sigma_theta = p(a^2+b^2)/(b^2-a^2) = 5p/3, u_r = (1+nu)/E * (A(1-2nu)a + B/a).
